caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap and a green t-shirt is seated in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, surrounded by racks of apparel and mannequins. The text on his shirt reads "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He is positioned in front of two black microphones on stands and wears black over-ear headphones. In the background, a sign reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and another displays "BOSSES TALK". Various framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a blue jacket are visible on the walls and behind him. Throughout the sequence, the man is engaged in a conversation, shifting his gaze and facial expressions. He begins with a slight smile, looking toward someone off-camera to his left, and transitions into a more active speaking expression with his mouth open, while remaining in the same seated position.
